calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-28-2005 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Mar-22-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: E. Estacio, CSR: JoAnn Prior.

Douglas Alan Holloway, Atty. for Plaintiff: Trinity Capital Corporation, present.
Declaration of Ernest I. Knowles Re: Default hearing on file.

After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: SEON MI LEE individually and dba FILLMORE CLEARNERS as follows:
Principal $36,633.82
Interest $1,139.02
Attorney's Fees $2,500.00
Costs $320.50 for a total of $40,595.34

Judgment signed in open court.
